title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Compare the photographs and answer the questions.

tasks.instructions: Compare two of the pictures, and say how the people might feel about their work environment and what challenges each situation might present.

images.label: A
images.description: People working in a busy open-plan office with rows of desks and computer screens.

images.label: B
images.description: A person working from home at a desk in a quiet room, with a laptop and coffee.

images.label: C
images.description: Construction workers on a building site wearing hard hats and high-visibility jackets.

followUp.question: Which of these work environments do you think leads to greater productivity? (Why?)

tasks.instructions: Compare two of the pictures, and say what the candidates might be thinking and how each recruitment method might affect their performance.

images.label: D
images.description: A candidate in formal attire sitting across from an interviewer in a smart office.

images.label: E
images.description: A person taking part in a video call job interview, wearing a smart shirt, at home.

images.label: F
images.description: A group of candidates working together on a task during an assessment centre exercise.

followUp.question: Which method of recruitment do you think is the most effective for employers? (Why?)
